name: Five Iron Golf
address: 104 S 4th St Suite G104, Louisville, KY 40202
about: Five Iron Golf is an indoor golf venue combining Trackman simulator bays with a full-service bar and chef-inspired menu. The facility features state-of-the-art dual-radar Trackman technology in custom-built bays, providing players access to 200+ virtual courses including PGA Tour venues like Pebble Beach. Membership options include free daily golf pending availability, walk-in privileges, and discounts on lessons and other services. Pricing for non-members varies by location, time, and day, with hourly bay rentals available.
why_golfers_like_it: Industry-leading Trackman technology provides accurate data for game improvement
No-dress-code atmosphere makes golf accessible and welcoming
Full-service bar and chef-inspired menu available on-site
Access to 200+ world-class virtual courses, including PGA Tour venues
Membership offers free daily golf and discounts on lessons and services

food_and_drink.notes: Chef-inspired menu with pizzas and appetizers
Full-service bar with drink specials and $5 shots

simulator_hardware.notes: Dual-radar Trackman launch monitors in custom-built simulator bays

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players are expected to bring their own clubs for use in the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted as the venue offers a full-service bar and chef-inspired menu.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A full 18-hole round typically takes about 3-4 hours depending on group size and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Five Iron offers junior clinics for kids ages 6-14 and hosts kids' birthday parties, making it family-friendly.
